description: Rise of Avalon Patch 8 (28 October 2020) — Changes and Improvements, and Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements
items: New Adventurer's Challenge furniture items restricted to Player Islands, Guild Islands, and Hideouts with reduced durability
Added hold functionality to plus/minus buttons on item amount slider
Improved tutorial hub interactions, layout, and added secondary completion options
[Mobile] Custom button now behaves like joystick mount button
sections.searchable_text: changes improvements furniture islands hideouts slider tutorial mobile ios delta patching

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Meteorite and Adamantium Elementals now show correct enchanted state
Improved hit detection for Devastating Strike (Black Hands); purge applies only on first hit
Fixed terrain issues in Undead Randomized Dungeons, Avalonian Dungeons, and Roads of Avalon
Tier 5 Deranged Heretic Arbalist name display fixed
[Mobile] Fixed vanity preview rotation gesture closing UI
[Mobile] Auto run stops on attack or cast
Various minor graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes elementals enchanting devastating strike black hands terrain dungeons mobile ui tooltip autorun
